# virtualbox_vm_storage_attachment (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `controller_name` (String) Name of the storage controller on the VM. Must match a `storage_controller.name` on the target VM.
- `device` (Number) Device number on the storage controller port.
- `medium` (String) Medium to attach. May be a disk UUID, absolute file path, `none`, or `emptydrive`.
- `port` (Number) Port number on the storage controller.
- `vm_id` (String) UUID of the virtual machine.

### Optional

- `medium_type` (String) Medium write mode. Must be one of: `normal`, `writethrough`, `immutable`, `shareable`, `readonly`, `multiattach`.
- `type` (String) Drive type. Must be one of: `hdd`, `dvddrive`, `fdd`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Storage attachment identifier in the form `<vm_id>/<controller_name>/<port>/<device>`.
- `last_updated` (String)
